parameters.jsCode:
const base = $('Normalize - Output Request').item.json;
const promptResponse = $json;
const promptText = String(promptResponse.content || promptResponse.text || '').trim();
if (!promptText) throw new Error(`Prompt file is empty or unreadable: ${base.promptTemplate}`);

const formatInstruction = base.targetOutputType === 'ia'
  ? [
      '## IA CSV Output Contract',
      'Return a strict JSON object only. Do not wrap it in markdown code fences.',
      'Required keys:',
      '- markdown: short IA summary in Markdown',
      '- csvContent: CSV text with header row',
      '- rows: array of objects matching the CSV columns',
      'Recommended columns: depth1, depth2, depth3, screenId, screenName, path, auth, component, description, policyRef, regionNote, status'
    ].join('\n')
  : base.targetOutputType === 'service_diagram'
    ? 'Return draw.io compatible mxfile XML only. Do not return Mermaid.'
    : 'Return the generated document body only.';

const userContent = [
  '# Agent2 Output Generation Input',
  '',
  '## Request Metadata',
  `targetOutputType: ${base.targetOutputType}`,
  `sourcePrdPath: ${base.sourcePrdPath}`,
  `serviceScenarioPath: ${base.serviceScenarioPath || ''}`,
  `serviceType: ${base.serviceType}`,
  `targetRegions: ${base.targetRegions.join(', ')}`,
  `supportedLanguages: ${base.supportedLanguages.join(', ')}`,
  `outputLanguage: ${base.outputLanguage}`,
  '',
  '## Format Instruction',
  formatInstruction,
  '',
  '## Region Policy Matrix',
  JSON.stringify(base.regionPolicyMatrix || [], null, 2),
  '',
  '## Business Policy Overrides',
  JSON.stringify(base.businessPolicyOverrides || {}, null, 2),
  '',
  '## Approved PRD Markdown',
  base.prdMarkdown
].join('\n');

return [{ json: {
  ...base,
  promptText,
  llmInput: userContent,
  openAiRequestBody: {
    model: base.model,
    temperature: base.temperature,
    max_tokens: base.maxTokens,
    messages: [
      { role: 'system', content: promptText },
      { role: 'user', content: userContent }
    ]
  }
}}];

const output = $('Prepare Output Result').item.json;
const save = $('Save Output to Blob').item.json || {};
return [{ json: {
  success: true,
  targetOutputType: output.targetOutputType,
  format: output.format,
  path: save.pathname || output.path,
  url: save.url || null,
  downloadUrl: save.downloadUrl || null,
  contentType: output.contentType,
  content: output.content,
  output: output.content,
  generatedContent: output.content,
  markdownContent: output.markdownContent || '',
  csvContent: output.csvContent || '',
  rows: output.rows || [],
  logPath: output.logPath,
  message: 'agent2 output generated',
  savedAt: new Date().toISOString()
}}];
